flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Santa Ana College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($508 → $658).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Santa Ana College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Santa Ana College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.8k → $10.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Santa Ana College rose 195% between 2007 and 2010 (9.9k → 29.1k).
